label: Sacred Political Order
description: The shared sacred-political structure that organizes political identity and meaning.

label: Institutional Embodiment
description: The degree to which the sacred political order is carried by institutions.

label: Self-Sacralization
description: The order treats its own survival as sacred.

label: Sacrificial Demand
description: The order demands suffering, killing, or dying in response to threat.

label: Sacrifice Form
description: Human good surrendered, including time, labor, health, conscience, family life, speech, agency, bodily risk, death, killing, martyrdom, or ritual sacrifice.

label: Sacrifice Health
description: Whether sacrifice is healthy, ambiguous, pathological, mixed, or unknown.

label: Sacrifice Boundedness
description: Whether sacrificial demand is bounded, partially bounded, unbounded, or unknown.
